query:
SELECT c.id as cat_id, c.name as categoria, mi.id as item_id, mi.name as item_nome, mi.image_url
FROM menu_categories c
JOIN menu_items mi ON mi.category_id = c.id
WHERE LOWER(c.name) LIKE '%bebida%'
ORDER BY c.id, mi.id;
